exercises.prompt: Translate to Bulgarian: "Hello, my name is Maria."
exercises.hint: Use Здравей for Hello, казвам се for my name is

exercises.prompt: Translate to Bulgarian: "I am from Sofia."
exercises.hint: Аз = I, съм = am, от = from

exercises.prompt: Translate to Bulgarian: "The book is interesting."
exercises.hint: Note: книгата uses the definite article suffix -та

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: "Аз ___ студент." (I am a student)
exercises.hint: Use the correct form of "to be" for first person singular

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: "Те ___ приятели." (They are friends)
exercises.hint: Use the correct form of "to be" for third person plural

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: "Утре ___ отида на работа." (I will go to work)
Translate to Bulgarian: "Thank you very much!"
Translate to Bulgarian: "We are learning Bulgarian."
exercises.hint: учим is the first person plural of учa

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: "Вчера аз ___ цял ден." (Yesterday I studied all day)
exercises.hint: Past tense of уча for first person singular

exercises.prompt: Translate to Bulgarian: "I will not go tomorrow."
